{{CargoRelic
|name=Alfredo's Film
|class_id=22472
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=08-13
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On Aug 13, 1988 AD, Alfredo handed Salvador the film clips he had saved for years.<br>Alfredo was a small-town movie projectionist, and due to the priest's strict requirements for age-inappropriate scenes, he would always cut those scenes out. Young Salvador followed him every day, learning the skills of filmmaking. Later, Alfredo had an accident and went blind, so Salvador took over as the projectionist. During this time, Salvador fell in love with a girl, but due to her father's interference, a heartbroken Salvador left the town to pursue his dreams. When he returned and received the film clips that Alfredo had cut, he suddenly understood everything that had happened in his life.
|fame=33
|art=30
|fth=22
|civ=46
|tech=23
|ss1=Per 3 Frost Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +16<br>Frost Protomon: 60/60
|ss2=Per 3 Frost Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +32<br>Frost Protomon: 60/60
|ss3=Per 3 Frost Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +48<br>Frost Protomon: 60/60
|ss4=Per 3 Frost Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +80<br>Frost Protomon: 60/60
|ss7=Per 3 Frost Protomon, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +80<br>Frost Protomon: 60/60<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 400 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Hamster skill I.png|50px]]Place in Hamster Biozilla: In Species War, Troop Fire DMG +10
}}
